revision_summary: Three targeted fixes required: (1) CODEX MISAPPLICATION — cherry_pick_moments[1]: replace protocols.hello_objection_not_interested with rebuttals.changed_mind and/or coaching_philosophy.objection_inversion. The hello_objection protocol has an explicit timing_constraint of first_30_seconds_only; Carol's scam label at 01:13 is outside that window. Update the codex_reference and revise the coaching_implication accordingly. (2) INTERNAL CONTRADICTION — rep_intent.evidence[1]: the orphaned-flow pivot at 01:17 is cited as evidence of reactive intent, but cherry_pick_moments[2] correctly praises the same action as schema-compliant. Remove 01:17 from rep_intent evidence or reconcile the contradiction explicitly. (3) CLASSIFICATION ERROR — cherry_pick_moments[3]: the 'knowledge_gap' classification is internally contradicted by the reasoning ('the knowledge gap is not factual'). Reclassify as 'other' (missed inversion / framing gap) and update the label. SECONDARY ADDITIONS RECOMMENDED (not blocking): (a) Add a cherry_pick moment for 00:22 (Carol's 'not a phone call to install some' — scam_anxiety_signal / consent-expectation gap, more upstream than the free-solar framing); (b) Promote the 01:28 flip opportunity to a standalone cherry_pick entry given its status as the call's highest-quality inversion moment and the codex's emphasis on objection_inversion as the #1 daily coaching contribution. (c) Soften trajectory_verdict.summary to acknowledge the brief window at 01:28 rather than declaring the call 'effectively over before it started.'
